title: Advice seen by our ministers - Ministry of Education
content:
Ngā kōrero tohutohu mā ngā Minita

## Advice seen by our ministers
Find out about the advice and reports we provide to ministers.
Topics are not available in this section
- Ngā kōrero e pā ana ki ngā tohutohu ka tukuna About the advice we release Information about the reports and advice our ministers have considered
Information about the reports and advice our ministers have considered
- Tauākī Pāpātanga Waeture Regulatory impact statements We write regulatory impact statements when we're proposing to create, change, or repeal legislation or regulations. They assess the impact of the proposed change on existing regulations.
We write regulatory impact statements when we're proposing to create, change, or repeal legislation or regulations. They assess the impact of the proposed change on existing regulations.
